title: Archboldiodendron calosericeum
taxonomy: Archboldiodendron calosericeum is a species of plant in the family Clusiaceae. It is native to Borneo. As a member of the Clusiaceae family, Archboldiodendron calosericeum is closely related to other plants such as Garcinia and Hypericum. The Clusiaceae family, also known as the St. John's Wort family, consists of around 1,500 species of flowering plants. This classification suggests that Archboldiodendron calosericeum shares characteristics and evolutionary history with other plants within this family.
